title: Can We Ever Develop an Ideal RNA Force Field? Lessons Learned from Simulations of the UUCG RNA Tetraloop and Other Systems
author: Kuehrova, Petra
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This upload contains only t he main article PDF  of the following publication: 
  Mlynsky, V., Kuhrova, P., Pykal, M., Krepl, M., Stadlbauer, P., Otyepka, M., Banas, P., & Sponer, J. (2025). Can We Ever Develop an Ideal RNA Force Field? Lessons Learned from Simulations of the UUCG RNA Tetraloop and Other Systems. Journal of Chemical Theory and Computation, DOI: 10.1021/acs.jctc.4c01357.  
 This is  not a raw data deposit . The full set of raw and analyzed simulation data associated with this study is available at:  https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.14692792
